; Test RPZ (Response Policy Zone) File
; Last modified: 2025-01-01
;
$TTL 300
@ IN SOA localhost. root.localhost. (
    2025010101 ; serial
    3600       ; refresh
    600        ; retry
    86400      ; expire
    300        ; minimum
)
@ IN NS localhost.
;
; Block rules (CNAME .)
ads.example.com CNAME .
tracking.example.org CNAME .
telemetry.test.net CNAME .
;
; Wildcard block
*.doubleclick.net CNAME .
